artifacts.title: Music receipt from 2022-01-01
artifacts.excerpt:
@goblinodds too lazy to answer the whole poll, but this is great. in my past, a combo of:

- too much moving around
- not putting myself out there enough (always computers or music in a room)
- selectiveness for sincere people
- distrusting dating apps + screen fatigue
- lacking confidence
